name: FEDERATED HERMES, INC.
business: Federated Hermes, Inc. is an investment management firm offering a wide range of investment strategies including money market, equity, fixed-income, alternative/private markets, and multi-asset offerings. It generates revenue primarily from investment advisory fees based on assets under management. Its customers include institutions, financial intermediaries, banks, broker/dealers, registered investment advisors, government entities, corporations, insurance companies, foundations, and endowments.
sellsTo: U.S. financial intermediaries (over 7,000 customers including banks, broker/dealers, registered investment advisors)
U.S. institutional investors (government entities, corporations, pension funds, foundations, endowments)
International investors (institutional and financial intermediary customers)

exposures.sentence: Federated Hermes also provides stewardship services to customers seeking a range of solutions for engagement, as well as real estate development and renewable energy project development services.

In contrast to last year’s report, which focused on 14 risks and vulnerabilities, the 2025 Annual Report discusses four key areas of focus for the upcoming year: (1) bolstering the Treasury market; (2) strengthening cybersecurity; (3) enhancing supervisory and regulatory frameworks for depository institutions; and (4) using artificial intelligence (AI) to strengthen financial stability.

risk areas impacting various market participants, such as cybersecurity, Regulation S-ID and Regulation S-P, emerging financial technology, regulation systems compliance and integrity, and anti-money laundering.

In contrast to last year’s report, which focused on 14 risks and vulnerabilities, the 2025 Annual Report discusses four key areas of focus for the upcoming year: (1) bolstering the Treasury market; (2) strengthening cybersecurity; (3) enhancing supervisory and regulatory frameworks for depository institutions; and (4) using artificial intelligence (AI) to strengthen financial stability.

catalysts.sentence: On January 29, 2026, the board of directors declared a $0.34 per share dividend.
